backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining CMS content types (events, scare zones, shows, attractions, haunted houses with characters/scenes/taglines), audition forms (scare actor, dance, costume character), access control integration, and CRUD operations for content items, auditions, user profiles, and main haunt schedule.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining legacy and new type schemas for content items, audition forms (scare actor, dance, costume character), haunted house characters with voice/scare types, and actor state structure to support data migration between canister versions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: Toys Come to Play haunted house with tagline, Blippy/Jiffy characters with 22 scenes, 2030 costume character investment announcement (Lola, Asher, Max, DD, princesses), and costume character audition information emphasizing vocal skills.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components, pages, hooks, and content modules including routing, audio management, themed sections, haunted houses, food booths, scare zones, audition flows, employee portal, and character pages with AI-generated imagery and horror theming.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color palettes using oklch color space for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors with horror-appropriate dark tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'TCEA Scream Park' title, root div mount point, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component with QueryClientProvider, hash-based routing for 30+ pages (home, haunted houses, food booths, scare zones, auditions, employee portal), BackgroundAudioManager integration, HorrorBackground theme, SiteHeader/Footer layout, and orchestration of all major sections including new CostumeCharacters2030Section and ToysComeToPlayPage.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Manages background audio playback (chainsaw and clown laugh loops) with autoplay detection, volume control, and fallback handling. Exposes callbacks for autoplay blocked state and manual playback triggering.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI controls for toggling sound on/off and adjusting volume with a slider. Shows an "Enable sound" button when autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays a full-page access denied message for users without administrator permissions to access the content management system.
frontend/src/components/auth/EmployeeGua: Route guard component that checks employee authentication and authorization, showing login prompts or access denied messages for non-employees.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, blocking dismissal until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/layout/EmployeeL: Layout wrapper for employee portal pages with breadcrumb navigation, header, and footer styled with employee-specific theme colors.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section component with title, optional subtitle, icon, and separator for consistent page section styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Site footer displaying an extreme haunt warning alert with liability waiver text and attribution with link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Main site header component with navigation menu, authentication controls, sound controls, and employee-specific links. Handles scroll effects, mobile menu, and routing between hash-based sections and routes.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video overlay modal with play/pause, mute/unmute controls, and keyboard escape support. Handles autoplay with fallback error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Section describing TCEA Scream Park's building structure and dark backstory about an evil spirit that delayed the 2022 opening until 2026. Includes exterior image and styled content cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Renders a grid of three perk cards (Food, Training, Scary Vibes) highlighting benefits for audition participants.
Displays two call-to-action cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with descriptions, badges, and buttons that trigger respective signup dialogs.

Dialog form for costume character audition submissions with fields for personal info, experience, vocal skills, and preferences; requires Internet Identity authentication and uses a custom hook for submission.
Dialog form for dancer audition applications requiring authentication via Internet Identity, with fields for name, age, experience, interests, and location preference.
Dialog form for scare actor audition applications requiring Internet Identity login, collecting name, age, experience, interests, and role preference (Sliders, Chainsaws, In-house, Stilts).
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions section displaying three audition types (Costume Character, Scream Team, Dancers) with cards, requirements, and signup dialogs. Includes perks block and navigation to detailed auditions page.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Section showcasing an interior elevation image of the Clown Town haunted house with descriptive text about the twisted circus atmosphere and carnival horror elements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Costume: Announcement section for 2030 investment featuring new costume characters (Lola, Asher, Max, DD) and princesses. Displays character cards with images and descriptions, linking to auditions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Employe: Conditional component that displays an employee portal access card only to authenticated employees, with navigation to secret tunnels and employee resources.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booths with pricing alerts ($9 all items, free samples), images, descriptions, and navigation to individual booth detail pages. Includes image fallback logic and route mapping for booth navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders a grid of haunted house cards with images, descriptions, wait times, and buttons to view guest rules or detailed house pages. Includes hover effects and dynamic routing based on house names.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Hero section with video background, logo, title, and description of the 2028 Fire Remix show with showtimes. Includes navigation buttons to auditions and specific audition pages for scare actors and dancers.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Video player section with autoplay, mute toggle, fullscreen controls, and clown laugh audio that plays when video ends. Includes error handling and fallback overlay for fullscreen on unsupported browsers.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Displays information about the Main Street Plaza Procession at 6pm, featuring an image and description of sliders, stilt walkers, zombies, and other creatures in the parade.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Shows operating hours (Fri-Sun, 5pm onwards), ticket pricing ($30), pass options via PassSelector component, and rules/warnings including the 11pm nightly release warning and scare actor interaction guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Displays a filterable merch storefront section featuring Felix's Merch Booth with category filters and a grid of product cards. Includes image handling with error states and integrates with merchProducts, merchCategories, and generatedImages content.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Defines the PassOption interface and exports an array of 9 pass options (Bloody, U Think U Brave, Regular, Horn, Content Creator, Touch, Skip the Line, Blackout, Kid) with id, name, price, and description for each.
Radio button selector for pass options with a 'Secure Your Pass' button that shows a temporary confirmation alert when a pass is selected and confirmed.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders a grid of scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and action buttons for viewing rules and details. Includes navigation to dedicated scare zone pages for Santa's Hell and Chainsaw Cold.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Displays sneak peek cards for four haunted houses (Schoolhouse, Clown Town, Hell Hole, Toys Come to Play) with images, descriptions, and navigation to detailed sneak peek pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Renders a grid of live show cards with images, descriptions, and badges indicating haunt season exclusivity. Includes error handling for show images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a carousel section for Sliders of Decade show content with image/video slides, thumbnail navigation, autoplay functionality, and fullscreen support with fallback overlay.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Displays teaser cards for two upcoming 2027 haunted houses (Hogs Pen and Shattered Minds) with taglines and atmospheric descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser section with animated icon and "Many Things to Come" message in a styled card.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming events in a grid of cards with image galleries, event details, and a special button to view the 'Frosted Haunt' event details. Includes an EventImageGallery component with navigation controls and error handling.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: React component that renders a layered horror-themed background with a chainsaw image, animated fire/smoke/blood/chainsaw overlays, orange/green gradient tints, noise texture, and scanline effects.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports foodBooths object containing an array of themed food booth descriptions with names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items for horror-themed food vendors (Clown town Chicken, Hell hole bbq, Schoolhouse Fish, etc.).
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Exports generatedImages object mapping names to image paths for haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, auditions, shows, and events categories.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Exports guestRules object containing safety rules, behavior rules, and health warnings organized by haunted house attraction (Open Ice Tomb, Wax Works, Terror Hell Hole, etc.).
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Exports hauntedHouses object with an array of haunted house attractions, each containing name, tagline, detailed description, subScenes array, and location fields.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Exports merchShops object containing an array of merchandise shops with name, items, and price fields, plus a note about additional shops throughout the park.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines the merchandise catalog with product types (hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, plushies) and a list of products featuring characters Riley, Ace, Kevin, and Rocky. Includes category definitions with icons and labels.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of scare zone descriptions including Carnival Bros Circus, Zombie Hell, Screamtown Chaos, Grave Danger Dance, and Steampunk Hell (coming 2028). Each zone has a name, tagline, and detailed horror-themed description.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Exports a single object describing the Schoolhouse Haunted House attraction with title, subtitle, description of the abandoned school horror theme, and an image path for the scenic elevation.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Exports an array of show descriptions including Circus Town, Dead Man's Revenge, Lost Spirits, Fire Remix, and Camp Riley. Each show has a name, description, and hauntSeasonOnly flag.
frontend/src/content/showsEntrance.ts: Defines the Shows & Processions Secret Entrance content with unlock year (2040), locked/unlocked descriptions, location details, and access instructions for performers and crew.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Exports a carousel/slider configuration for "Sliders of Decade" featuring image and video items with titles and descriptions showcasing a decade of terror theme.
frontend/src/content/tceaTunnels.ts: Defines content for TCEA Tunnels employee facilities including secret entrance details, dormitories, cafeteria, TV room, and lounge areas with comprehensive descriptions of amenities and access procedures.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Exports an array of upcoming events including Chaos Purge, Death Eaters, Frosted Haunt, Viva Nova, DMV Harbor Nights, and TCEA Horror Nights with dates, descriptions, and warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handles anonymous/authenticated actor instances, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: Custom React hook that fetches audition links from the backend actor using React Query, with proper dependency on actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides React Query mutations for submitting three types of audition forms (scare actor, dancer, costume character) to the backend actor, with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching user authorization data including role, admin status, employee status, and user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Custom hook that manages video autoplay state, handles browser autoplay blocking, and provides play/pause controls for a video element reference.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on content items (events, scare zones, shows, attractions) and includes a seed function for initial content.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployeeEvents.ts: React Query hook that fetches upcoming events for the authenticated employee from the current date forward.
React Query hook that retrieves the event unlock status for the authenticated user from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Custom hook providing cross-browser fullscreen API support with enter, exit, and toggle functions for a given HTML element reference.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
React Query hooks for fetching and updating the main haunt event schedule with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Custom hook that manages sound preferences (enabled/volume) with localStorage persistence and provides setter functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useTunnelData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching tunnel-related data including tunnel maps, room assignments, and tunnel schedules from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts (Creepster, Inter), Tailwind directives, and defines a horror-themed design system using OKLCH color variables for dark backgrounds, orange/red/green accents, and employee portal styling. Includes utility classes for glowing text effects and hover animations.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions for formatting backend content types into human-readable strings, including dates, event types, scare levels, zone locations, age restrictions, and performance types. Also provides a function to generate type-specific field summaries for content items.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: Protected page displaying actor staffing information that requires Internet Identity authentication. Shows access denied screen for unauthenticated users and fetches/displays staffing counts for authenticated actors.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Public page displaying available audition opportunities with external links, featuring a hiring banner for makeup artists and filtering out placeholder URLs. Includes loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar view page that displays all content items (events, attractions, shows, scare zones) grouped by date with filtering capabilities. Supports URL hash navigation to specific dates and expands date ranges to show items on all applicable days.
Detail page for the 'Candy Cane Carnage' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Chainsaw Cold' scare zone featuring zone description, extreme horror warning alert, image display, and navigation to rules page.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Sneak peek page for 'Clown Town' haunted house displaying a large hero image, title, tagline, and description with back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Content management system page with authentication/authorization checks, allowing admins to create, update, delete content items and manage main haunt schedules through tabbed interface.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: Dancer audition application form requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting applicant details (name, age, height, weight, experience, role preference) and submitting to backend.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: Detail page for 'Eggnog Exorcism' food booth displaying booth image, description, and menu items with back navigation to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeUpcomingEvent: Employee-only page displaying upcoming events and features with locked/unlocked status badges, event images, and conditional navigation to detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/FlynCharacterPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying details about the Flyn character, including unlock status, biography, appearance schedule, and costume specifications. Uses EmployeeGuard and EmployeeLayout with conditional rendering based on event unlock status.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: Public-facing detail page for the "Frosted Haunt" seasonal event (Nov 29–Dec 26, 2026), featuring event description, warnings, highlights, and a back-to-home navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: Detail page for the "Gingerdead Bakes" food booth, displaying booth information, tagline, description, and menu items with a back-to-food-booths navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Dynamic rules page that displays guest safety rules for specific haunted houses or scare zones based on URL hash parameters, with navigation back to the appropriate section.
frontend/src/pages/HappilyScaryAfterPage: Employee-only page for the "Happily Scary After" fireworks show, displaying unlock status, show description, schedule, and operational details with conditional rendering based on event unlock status.
Detail page for the 'Hellfire Hot Cocoa' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Detail page showcasing the "Terror Hell Hole" haunted house with a special focus on the "Vicky's Saw" scenic element, featuring multiple images and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Laser Hell' scare zone, showing zone image, description, tagline, and location with back navigation and error handling for missing zones.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Open Ice Tomb' haunted house featuring an extreme horror warning alert and a button to view guest rules before entering.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Detail page for the 'Ornament Ossuary' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Santa's Hell' scare zone with extreme horror warning alert and navigation to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Audition application form for scare actors requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting personal details, experience, and role preferences with form validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Preview page displaying a sneak peek of the schoolhouse attraction with image, title, subtitle, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SecretTunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying confidential backstage tunnel system information including maps, room assignments, and schedules with loading/error states and restricted access warnings.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Sharks Hell' food booth displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with navigation back to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ShowsEntrancePage.tsx: Employee-only page showing secret entrance details for shows and processions with unlock status checking, location information, and access instructions that appear when unlocked.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Slider Doom' food booth displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with navigation back to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/TCEATunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying TCEA tunnel facilities including secret entrance details, dormitories, cafeteria, and TV room with security notes and facility descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlayPage.ts: Detail page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house featuring hero image, extreme horror warnings, attraction description highlighting 22 different scenes, and navigation to view rules.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Displays a detailed sneak peek page for the 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with image, title, tagline, and description, including a back button to return home.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Shows the 'Wax Works' haunted house detail page with extreme horror warning, description, image, and buttons to navigate back or view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Renders a food booth detail page for 'Wrath of Wrapping' displaying booth image, description, and full menu with item descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides utilities to expand EventDateRange objects into individual date keys, handling date arithmetic and leap years for calendar functionality.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Exports a slugify function that converts text to URL-safe lowercase slugs by removing special characters and replacing spaces with hyphens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including horror-themed colors, animations (pulse-glow, strobe-flash, horror-drift), employee portal colors, and font families.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking implemented features (Toys Come to Play haunted house, 2030 expansion characters) and pending feature requests (room assignments, interactive tunnel map).
